Description: The title of the study, publication, funding, grant, event, innovation or other accomplishment that is being promoted.

The primary investigator or co-investigators of the study, publication or project that is being promoted. If there are several co-investigators, create this entry with the one PI first, then right click on this item and run the automation to duplicate it for the other co-investigators.
The date when this work was first promoted by the center.
The channel(s) used for promoting this piece.
If applicable, the program or offering related to this promotion.
The short link used during promotions and campaigns.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.

CustomFormatter: The job title of the investigator (automatic).

Description: The e-mail address of the investigator (automatic).
